title: Quexo's Colored Maces
description: Different Colored Maces Depending On Their Enchants!
body:
📒 Change Your Mace's Color Depending On Enchants!

- 🖤 Netherite Mace - No Enchants
- ❤️ Redstone Mace - Density
- 💙 Blue Mace - Breach
- 🧡 Copper Mace - Any Enchants [Besides Breach/Density]
- 🌈 Rainbow Mace - Breach + Density [Only Obtainable Via Commands]


💛 Quexo's Golden Mace - Every Mace Enchants On One Mace
